name: Sword Duel
short_description: A 3D sword-fighting game with reflex-based combat. Face off in 20 duels, master three attack and defense styles, and collect rare orbs to gain an edge.
detailed_description:
Sword Duel is a skill-based 3D sword-fighting game set on a mysterious island. Face off against a powerful enemy in 20 increasingly difficult levels. Each duel tests your reaction speed and strategy with three unique attack styles and three corresponding defensive moves. Mastering the right defense at the right time is key to survival.

Scattered across the battlefield are limited advantage orbs that can boost your stats—such as health, attack speed, or damage—for a short time. Collecting them strategically can turn the tide of battle in your favor.

Designed for both keyboard and gamepad, Sword Duel focuses on reflex-based timing and tactical combat mechanics. Can you adapt to the escalating pace and conquer all 20 levels?
